CustomField.description: Business days (Mon-Fri, weekends excluded) elapsed from the gift date (Close Date) to today. Drives the 48-hour (2 business day) acknowledgment SLA report. Live formula, no staleness. JSI-87 / Jason Ott.
CustomField.formula: (5 * ( FLOOR( ( TODAY() - DATE(1900,1,8) ) / 7 ) ) + MIN(5, MOD( TODAY() - DATE(1900,1,8), 7 ))) - (5 * ( FLOOR( ( CloseDate - DATE(1900,1,8) ) / 7 ) ) + MIN(5, MOD( CloseDate - DATE(1900,1,8), 7 )))
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Business days since the gift date. Used for the 48-hour (2 business day) acknowledgment SLA.
CustomField.label: Acknowledgment Age (Business Days)
